column1: Prefix legend (xlsx/xlsm sources): C23 = Annex C Indicator E. coli 2023-24; C22 = Annex C 2022-23; D23 = Annex D.1 ESBL/AmpC/CP-producing E. coli 2023-24; D22 = Annex D.1 2022-23 (Salmonella sheets dropped); Y19 = 2019 EFSA dashboard export; EX = E.coli.xlsx dashboard export.

Prefix legend (PDF sources): PC21/PC20 = Annex C Indicator E. coli PDFs (2021-22, 2020-21); PD18 = 2018-19 Annex D Indicator E. coli PDF; PD21/PD20 = Annex D ESBL/AmpC/CP-producing E. coli PDFs; PE18 = 2018-19 Annex E ESBL/AmpC/CP-producing E. coli PDF (Salmonella-only tables filtered out).
PDF sheets are named '{prefix} p{NN}' for the original PDF page. Each sheet contains the section title, auto-detected tables, and (where extraction failed) the raw page text in column A.

PDF table extraction uses pdfplumber's default detector. Where it failed, the page's raw text is dumped to column A so no content is lost. Some column alignment may be approximate — the xlsx-derived sheets (C22-D23, Y19, EX) are the authoritative numerical source where they overlap with PDFs.
Salmonella sheets that were in the 2022-23 Annex D.1 workbook have been dropped per request.
MRSA, Salmonella, and Campylobacter data in the Data folder were not included (this workbook is E. coli only).
